incorrects.description: Student set incorrect heights on first attempt

steps.text: Check the table. Each symbol stands for 5.

incorrects.description: Student set incorrect heights on second attempt

steps.text: Let's think about this together. Milk is 15—that's 3 symbols. Water is 30—that's 6 symbols.

incorrects.description: Student set incorrect heights three or more times — system models the answer

params.description: System demonstrates setting Milk to 3 symbols (15÷5=3) and Water to 6 symbols (30÷5=6)

steps.text: Let me show you. Milk is 15, so I divide by 5—that's 3 symbols. Water is 30, so I divide by 5—that's 6 symbols. Each symbol represents 5.
